title: Phase 5: Associations
description: Implement has_many (GSI query on foreign table), belongs_to (PK lookup), has_many_through (junction table), and self-referential associations (parent/child trees). See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: starting Phase 5 associations. Plan: implement belongs_to, has_many, has_many_through, self-referential in Python+Rust tables plus Behave/Cucumber steps and tests; keep parity. Blockers: none.

comments.text: Standup: Associations phase delivered (belongs_to, has_many, self-referential, through) in Python/Rust with tests + parity; Next: roll remaining phases; Blockers: none.
